LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF SANMO INTERNATIONAL COMPANY, INC.'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT. ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF SANMO INTERNATIONAL COMPANY, INC.'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT WAS DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT SUE ANN RIVIECCIO-ASARO AND, AT MR. ALLAN'S REQUEST, THE COURT DISMISSED THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AS TO DEFENDANT RIVIECCIO-ASARO. THE COURT FOUND THAT BASED ON THE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER OF AUGUST 1, 2007, DEFENDANT VINCE RIVIECCIO WAS NOT IN CONTEMPT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Plaintiff Sanmo International Company, Inc.'S Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt
Off Calendar Nov-07-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Douglas W. Allan, 439.8889, appearing for defendants and responding parties
Omar Nakib of the Tour-Sarkissian Law Offices, 626.7744, appearing for plaintiff and moving party

Argued and the Court ruled as follows: Plaintiff Sanmo International Company, Inc.'s Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt was denied as to defendant Sue Ann Rivieccio-Asaro and, at Mr. Allan's request, the Court dismissed the Order to Show Cause as to defendant Rivieccio-Asaro. The Court found that based on the Temporary Restraining Order of August 1, 2007, defendant Vince Rivieccio was not in contempt. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-27-2007 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Sanmo International Company, Inc.'S Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt

RULING: HEARING HELD. COURT FINDS THAT THERE WAS NO PERSONAL SERVICE ON DEFENDANTS AND THERE IS NO WAIVER ON SERVICE. PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF COUNSEL, COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO NOVEMBER 7, 2007 AT 1:30 P.M. THE TERMS OF THE SEPTEMBER 13, 2007 EX PARTE ORDER CONTINUES IN EFFECT AS TO VINCE RIVIECCIO, JR. AND SUE ANN RIVIECCIO-ASARO. MR. BORNSTEIN INDICATES THAT HE WILL ACCEPT SERVICE OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: TRINA AYALA, CSR 12964
